from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_025d127b(I):
    x1 = objects(I, T, F, T)
    x2 = apply(color, x1)
    x3 = merge(x1)
    x4 = lbind(colorfilter, x1)
    x5 = rbind(argmax, rightmost)
    x6 = compose(x5, x4)
    x7 = mapply(x6, x2)
    x8 = difference(x3, x7)
    O = move(I, x8, RIGHT)
    return O
